import datetime
from voice.speak_utils import speak_time

cases = [
    \(3, 54\),   # three fifty-four AM
    \(15, 7\),   # three oh seven PM
    \(12, 0\),   # twelve noon
    \(0, 0\),    # twelve midnight
    \(9, 5\),    # nine oh five AM
    \(10, 0\),   # ten AM
    \(0, 30\),   # twelve thirty AM
    \(23, 59\),  # eleven fifty-nine PM
    \(11, 11\),  # eleven eleven AM
    \(20, 20\),  # eight twenty PM
]
for h, m in cases:
    dt = datetime.datetime\(2024, 1, 1, h, m\)
    print\(f'  {h:02d}:{m:02d} → \\"{speak_time\(dt\)}\\"'\)
")

from api.main import app
routes = [\(r.methods, r.path\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'methods'\) and r.methods]
ws     = [r.path for r in app.routes if not hasattr\(r, 'methods'\) or not r.methods]
print\('=== REST routes ==='\)
for methods, path in sorted\(routes, key=lambda x: x[1]\):
    print\(f'  {sorted\(methods\)[0]:<8} {path}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== WebSocket / other routes ==='\)
for p in ws:
    print\(f'  WS/other  {p}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. /home/kiko/JARVIS_MKIII/venv/bin/python3 -c "
from system.intent_router import _os_intent_match

tests = [
    \('click on the chrome icon',          'autogui'\),
    \('take a screenshot of my desktop',   'autogui'\),
    \('take a screenshot of screen',       'autogui'\),
    \('what do you see on my screen',      'vision'\),
    \('describe the screen',               'vision'\),
    \('press ctrl+alt+t',                  'autogui'\),
    \('what app is open',                  'vision'\),
    \('move the mouse to 500 200',         'autogui'\),
    \('automate clicking the button',      'autogui'\),
    \('take a screenshot',                 'browser'\),   # browser screenshot, not desktop
    \('search the web for python',         'browser'\),
    \('create a file called test.txt',     'file'\),
    \('list processes',                    'process'\),
    \('research quantum computing',        'research'\),
    \('write a python script',             'code'\),
]

failures = 0
for text, expected in tests:
    action, _ = _os_intent_match\(text\)
    ok = action == expected
    if not ok: failures += 1
    print\(f'  {\\"✓\\" if ok else \\"✗\\"} {\(action or \\"NO MATCH\\"\):<12} \(expected {expected:<12}\) ← {text}'\)

print\(\)
print\(f'ALL OK' if not failures else f'{failures} FAILURE\(S\)'\)
")
